title: Claims Analyst
description: 3M is seeking a Claims Analyst to manage insurance claims and support our risk management operations. Working remotely, you will investigate claims, review documentation, coordinate with carriers, and ensure timely resolution. Your work protects 3M's assets and supports optimal claim outcomes.
responsibilities: Receive and log incoming insurance claims
Investigate claims and request documentation from claimants
Coordinate with insurance carriers and adjusters
Prepare claim reports and cost analyses
Track claim status and ensure timely updates
Identify trends and recommend risk mitigation strategies

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Risk Management, or related field
skills: Communication with internal stakeholders and carriers

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance
